sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41131" key="e)pisunaptiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισυν-απτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n41131.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">apt to cause a combination,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κακῶν,</foreign> of the moon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.115.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
